page_desc_home: Create, save, and share Granblue Fantasy party compositions
page_desc_teams: Save and discover teams to use in Granblue Fantasy
page_desc_collection: Manage your character, weapon, and summon collection
page_desc_party: Browse this team for {raidName} by {username} on granblue.team
about_subtitle: Granblue.team is a tool to save and share team compositions for Granblue Fantasy, a social RPG from Cygames.
about_explanation_0: To get started, all you have to do is add an item to a team and a URL will be created for you to share wherever you like, no account needed.
about_explanation_1: If you do make an account, you can save any teams you find for future reference and keep all of your teams together in one place.
about_feedback_explanation: If you have a feature request, would like to report a bug, or are enjoying the tool and want to say thanks, come hang out in Discord.
about_feedback_solicit: Feedback and suggestions are greatly appreciated!
about_credits_maintainer: Granblue.team was built and is maintained by @jedmund.
about_credits_assistance: Many thanks to @lalalalinna and @tarngerine, who both provided a lot of help and advice as I was ramping up.
about_credits_support: Many thanks also go to everyone in Fireplace and the granblue-tools Discord for all of their help with bug testing, feature requests, and moral support. (P.S. We're recruiting!)
about_contributing_explanation: If you know how to program, this app is completely open-source. There's an abundance of features to build and bugs to fix, so help is always greatly appreciated!
about_license_text: This app is licensed under GNU AGPLv3.
about_license_explanation: Plainly, that means you can download the source, modify it, and redistribute it as long as you attribute this project, use the same license, and keep your derivative work open source as well.
about_copyright_explanation: This app is a fan work. Granblue Fantasy and all characters, weapons, summons, items and artwork are wholly owned by Cygames, Inc.
about_roadmap_link_intro: You can see the full roadmap on Github below:
page_desc_updates: Content and feature updates for granblue.team
page_desc_extension: Download the granblue.team Chrome extension to sync your game data
ext_description: Use the Chrome extension to passively capture your in-game teams and collection and send it to granblue.team.
ext_compatibility: Compatible with desktop Chromium-based browsers like Google Chrome, Vivaldi, Microsoft Edge, and more.
ext_feature_collection_desc: Capture your in-game characters, weapons, and summons to make sharing your collection and finding new teams easier.
ext_feature_parties_desc: Import your teams and easily workshop them or share with others with a click.
ext_faq_desc: This extension runs in the background and passively reads network data that your browser already receives while you play. This lets us extract your characters, weapons, summons, teams, and other data to send to your granblue.team account.
ext_faq_safe_title: Is this extension safe to use?
ext_faq_safe_desc: Yes, the extension only reads network data that your browser is already receiving. It never touches the game page or contacts Granblue Fantasy servers.
ext_faq_ban_title: Will I get banned for using this?
ext_faq_ban_desc:
No users have been banned for using this extension or other similar extensions. As the extension doesn't interact with the game, it shouldn't trigger anti-cheat.

That being said, using any browser extension while playing Granblue Fantasy is technically against the Terms of Service, so use this extension at your own discretion. We're not responsible for what happens to your Granblue Fantasy account while this extension is in use.
ext_faq_install_desc:
1. After you've downloaded the extension above, extract the .zip file to somewhere convenient.
  2. Open chrome://extensions in your browser and enable Developer mode in the top-right corner.
  3. In the top-left corner, click Load unpacked, then select the folder you extracted earlier.
  4. Open the extension by clicking the icon in your browser's extension tray and log in to your granblue.team account.
